info.title: Bonsai Serializer Generator
info.description: Tool for automatically generating serialization classes from JSON Schema files.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace to use for generated code. If not specified, the sanitized name of the schema file will be used.

options.name: --root
options.description: Type name hint to use for the schema root element. If not specified, the title of the schema will be used.

options.name: --output
options.description: Location to place the generated output. The default is the current directory.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the generated output file. If not specified, the namespace will be used.

options.name: --serializer
options.description: Specifies the serializer data annotations to include in the generated classes.

arguments.name: schema
arguments.description: Specifies the URL or path to the JSON schema describing the data types for which to generate serialization classes.
